findings.description: The source JSP code examples include important implementation constraints in comments that are omitted from the knowledge file: (1) In pattern 1: '※name の名称は任意だが、keyNames の名称と選択された複合キーのプロパティ名は一致させる必要がある。' — keyNames values must match the composite key property names. (2) In pattern 2: '※name は必ず CompositeKey を表す名称とする。' — the name attribute must use a name representing CompositeKey. These constraints are necessary for correct implementation.
findings.source_evidence: Pattern 1 JSP comment: '※name の名称は任意だが、 keyNames の名称と選択された複合キーのプロパティ名は一致させる必要がある。' Pattern 2 JSP comment: '※name は必ず CompositeKey を表す名称とする。'

findings.location: automated warning — Section count 6 < source headings 11
findings.description: The automated pre-check warning about section count (6 < 11) is a false positive. The source RST file contains exactly 6 actual headings: the top-level heading plus 5 subsection headings (passwordタグ, radioButtonタグ, checkboxタグ, compositeKeyRadioButtonタグ/compositeKeyCheckboxタグ, List型変数に対応するカスタムタグの共通属性). The inflated count of 11 in the automated check appears to include RST anchor labels (e.g., '.. _form_input:', '.. _WebView_SingleCheckBoxTag:', '.. _WebView_MultiSelectCustomTag:', '.. _WebView_ListSelectCommon:') which are not headings. The knowledge file's 6 sections correctly map to the 6 actual source headings.
findings.source_evidence: Source contains RST anchor directives (.. _form_input:, .. _WebView_SingleCheckBoxTag:, .. _WebView_MultiSelectCustomTag:, .. _WebView_ListSelectCommon:) which are cross-reference targets, not content headings.
